title: Dependency Filed Event
description: Emitted by an agent when it declares a cross-agent dependency — its own work is blocked until another agent (or the ratifier) delivers a named artifact. The Orchestrator's dependency graph is the reduction over dep_filed minus dep_satisfied. A still-open dep older than its SLA surfaces as a cockpit blocker.

dep_id.description: Stable dependency identifier; referenced by the matching dep_satisfied event

blocking_target.description: Agent ID, repo, ratifier, or 'spec-corpus-agent' expected to satisfy the dependency

blocks.description: What work of the filing agent is blocked

spec_refs.description: Canonical artifact / SI / invariant references that define the dependency

blocked_pr.description: Optional PR number that cannot proceed

sla_hours.description: Expected satisfaction window before the dep escalates to a cockpit blocker
